title: Idle Boost
description: This mod optimizes performance when Minecraft is running in the background.
body:
**Idle Boost** was created by [Kyronis](https://modrinth.com/user/Kyronis). This mod reduces FPS and render distance when Minecraft is running in the background.

There are some advantages this mod has over other similar mods:
- ⚙️ Easy to configure via a custom options menu
- 🔁 Works on Fabric and NeoForge
- 🧩 No dependencies required
- 📦 Small and lightweight, with a file size of 24KB/25KB
- 🔓 Open Source

My mod is also available on CurseForge. [Click here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/idle-boost)

[![Instant Gaming banner](https://i.imgur.com/Yvbk2dn.gif)](https://www.instant-gaming.com/?igr=simon28mc)

---

### 📌🌍 Latest Versions & Supported Languages
A full and always up-to-date version and language list is now available [here](https://kyronis.net/mods/idle-boost) on the official website.

You can help translate Idle Boost! Click [here](https://crowdin.com/project/idle-boost)
